*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Abscess to Right cervical / Measures 1.6 cm x 0.5 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serous, light. No odor noted. Treatment: Pack with iodoform gauze daily.
Wound note - Rightcervica. Meas 1.6x0.5x0.4cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 35% gran, 65% slough. Periwound macerated. Alginate dsg applied. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Bergstrom notified.
